campaign: The Imagine Team — Harry Potter & Titanic Exhibitions
objective: Drive ticket sales for immersive experiences

harry_potter.key_message: Step into the world. Experience magic like never before.
harry_potter.fomo_angle: Limited time. Every ticket is a portal you won't get twice.
harry_potter.audience_feeling: If I don't go, I'll regret it forever
harry_potter.visual_direction: Moody, enchanted, golden hour lighting, intimate magic moments, crowd energy

titanic.key_message: Walk the decks. Feel the scale. Understand the story.
titanic.fomo_angle: Once-in-a-lifetime experience. Step aboard before it sails.
titanic.audience_feeling: This is the closest I'll ever get to that moment
titanic.visual_direction: Cinematic scale, atmospheric lighting, ship details, crowd reaction, emotional moments

immersion.description: Show the environment, sets, details that make it real
immersion.content_type: Cinematic walkthroughs, detail shots, POV videos
immersion.goal: Make viewers feel like they're already there

emotion.description: Capture crowd reactions, emotional moments, wonder
emotion.content_type: User reactions, family moments, awe-struck faces

experience.description: Show what you DO, interact with, feel
experience.content_type: Interactive elements, photo ops, multisensory moments

urgency.description: Limited time, limited capacity, exclusive access
urgency.content_type: Countdown posts, capacity reminders, early access offers
urgency.goal: Convert interest to immediate ticket purchase

harry_potter.typography: Serif (elegant, timeless) for headlines + Sans (clean) for CTAs
harry_potter.photography_style: Moody, intimate, magic hour, warm practical lighting

titanic.typography: Elegant serif (historic, grand) + modern sans for CTAs
titanic.photography_style: Cinematic scale, dramatic lighting, architectural majesty, ocean atmosphere

stage_2_consideration.goal: Build desire, show full experience scope

stage_3_decision.content: 60s full story videos with social proof, specific experience highlights

stage_4_conversion.content: Carousel ads with pricing, dates, testimonials, urgency language

consideration.metric: Website clicks, product page views, time on page
consideration.target: 5% of viewers click to ticket page

conversion.metric: Tickets sold, revenue, cost per ticket acquisition
